mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, nickname, credit_score, role, status, created_at FROM `user` ORDER BY user_id

SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, u.nickname AS seller_nickname FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON p.seller_id = u.user_id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM order_info WHERE status = 3
SELECT c.name AS name, COUNT(p.product_id) AS cnt FROM category c LEFT JOIN product p ON p.category_id = c.category_id AND p.status = 1 GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name HAVING cnt > 0 ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT u.nickname AS name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS cnt FROM `user` u JOIN order_info o ON o.buyer_id = u.user_id GROUP BY u.user_id, u.nickname ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5
